what_it_does: Defines the ConceptV Studio React root component, owns top-level persisted and transient UI state, wires global stores/events into React state, chooses the active canvas, and renders shell chrome, modals, command palette, chat rail, and save modal.
observations: Uses React hooks through aliased globals from React.
Stores many workspace surfaces through window.usePersisted keys such as inbox, genIcons, extraColors, templates, workshopDocs, and workspaceVars.
Subscribes to CV_REGISTRY, cvImageStore, and cvOpenAI only to increment registryTick and force render updates.
Applies persisted color and pattern edits directly to document.documentElement CSS custom properties.
Exposes global navigation through window.cvNav and listens for a global tb-open event.
Builds counts and recent activity inline from persisted state and global stores.
Uses an active string to select the canvas component through an if/else chain.
standouts: Top-level component acts as both application shell and state coordinator for design-system surfaces.
Global window-backed stores and events are used as integration points between canvases.
Design token edits are persisted and also projected into live CSS variables.
conventions: Uses window-scoped services and stores instead of module imports in this file.
Uses functional state updates for list and object mutations.
Uses string ids for navigation targets.
Uses short handler functions passed down as props to canvas components.
Keeps session-persisted state near the root and passes specific mutators into child surfaces.
concerns: registryTick is written only to force re-renders and is not otherwise read.
Several effects use empty dependency arrays while referencing values from initial render, including generatedIcons rehydration.
setPatternEdit performs a DOM side effect inside a state updater when clearing a value.
addExtraColors and saveTemplate append or prepend without local deduplication.
The active-canvas if/else chain concentrates routing knowledge in the root component.
notes: This file is the app-level coordinator that binds persisted design-system state, global services, navigation, and rendered canvases into one shell.
questions: Should generated icon add/update/remove operations also keep window.CV_ICONS.data synchronized in every path?
Is registryTick intentionally unused except as a render trigger?
Should resetSession clear all persisted keys mentioned here, including workshop docs and workspace vars?
Are active route ids meant to be centralized outside this component?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as the ConceptV Studio root matches the file: it renders the root shell and coordinates app-wide state, routing, and global integrations.
intention_signals: The file appears intended to make individual design-system surfaces share one persisted workspace while allowing global shortcuts, events, and stores to update the active canvas and shell indicators.
novelty: The root blends React state with window-scoped registries, live CSS custom-property projection, and cross-canvas global navigation hooks.
contribution: Contributes a unified application shell that keeps persisted studio data, navigation, token application, workspace document synchronization, command access, export state, and canvas selection connected in one place.
summary_for_embedding: A React root component for ConceptV Studio that owns persisted design-system workspace state, subscribes to global stores, applies token edits to CSS variables, routes between canvases, and renders app shell utilities.
intention_for_embedding: It was for coordinating the studio experience so icons, colors, patterns, templates, registry, workshop docs, and settings share navigation, persistence, and shell-level integrations.

symbols.does: Defines and renders the ConceptV Studio root React component.
symbols.description: App owns top-level persisted state, transient shell state, global subscriptions, keyboard handling, CSS token projection, and active-canvas routing. It renders the sidebar or reopen button, the selected main canvas, chat rail, toast, export patch, command palette, and save-as-type modal.

symbols.does: Handles global tb-open events by opening the type builder.
symbols.description: onOpen reads an optional id from the event detail, stores it as the TypeBuilder initial type id, and changes the active surface to type-builder. It is registered and removed inside an effect.

symbols.does: Adds or replaces a workshop document in persisted state.
symbols.description: saveWorkshopDoc finds an existing workshop document by id and replaces it if found. If no match exists, it prepends the document to the persisted workshopDocs list.

symbols.does: Removes a workshop document by id.
symbols.description: removeWorkshopDoc filters the persisted workshopDocs list to drop the matching document. It leaves all other document entries unchanged.

symbols.does: Toggles a color token name in the lockedTokens list.
symbols.description: toggleLock checks whether the provided name is already locked. It removes present names and appends absent names through a functional persisted-state update.

symbols.does: Prepends a saved rewrite and caps the list at 50 entries.
symbols.description: addSavedRewrite adds the new rewrite entry to the front of savedRewrites. It slices the resulting list so only the first 50 entries remain.

symbols.does: Removes a saved rewrite by id.
symbols.description: removeSavedRewrite filters savedRewrites to exclude the rewrite with the supplied id. It is passed to the Voice canvas.

symbols.does: Opens the command palette on Cmd+K or Ctrl+K.
symbols.description: onKey listens for keydown events, checks for a platform command modifier or control key with the K key, prevents the browser default behavior, and sets paletteOpen to true. It is registered globally during the component lifetime.

symbols.does: Adds one generated icon if its name is not already persisted.
symbols.description: addGeneratedIcon updates generatedIcons with a functional state change. It preserves the previous list when an icon with the same name already exists.

symbols.does: Updates the body for one generated icon by name.
symbols.description: updateGeneratedIcon maps over generatedIcons and replaces the body field for the matching name. Non-matching generated icon records are returned unchanged.

symbols.does: Removes a generated icon from persisted generatedIcons by name.
symbols.description: removeGeneratedIcon filters generatedIcons so entries with the supplied name are excluded. This function only updates the persisted generated icon list in this file.

symbols.does: Adds multiple generated icons to CV_ICONS.data and persisted generatedIcons with deduplication by name.
symbols.description: addGeneratedIcons first writes each missing icon body into the global CV_ICONS.data object when that store exists. It then appends entries not already present in generatedIcons by name.

symbols.does: Appends colors to the extraColors persisted list.
symbols.description: addExtraColors concatenates the provided list to the existing extraColors array. It does not perform filtering or validation in this file.

symbols.does: Stores a color token edit by token name.
symbols.description: setColorEdit merges a name-to-hex entry into the colorEdits object. A separate effect applies colorEdits to root CSS custom properties.

symbols.does: Stores or clears a pattern token edit by token name.
symbols.description: setPatternEdit copies the previous patternEdits object, deletes the token when val is null, or stores the supplied value otherwise. When clearing, it also removes the corresponding CSS custom property from document.documentElement inside the updater.

symbols.does: Toggles a pattern token name in the lockedPatterns list.
symbols.description: togglePatternLock mirrors the color-token lock behavior for pattern tokens. It removes existing names and appends new names through a functional state update.

symbols.does: Shows a delayed toast after inbox application for icons or colors.
symbols.description: onInboxApplied waits 1500 milliseconds before showing a category-specific toast through window.dsaToast. It handles icons and colors categories in this file.

symbols.does: Clears studio storage and reloads after confirmation.
symbols.description: resetSession asks for confirmation before clearing window.cvStudioStorage and reloading the page. If the user cancels, it returns without clearing state.

symbols.does: Prepends a template to savedTemplates.
symbols.description: saveTemplate stores a new template at the front of the persisted savedTemplates list. It does not inspect the template id in this file.

symbols.does: Removes a saved template by id.
symbols.description: removeTemplate filters savedTemplates to drop the template with the provided id. It is passed to the Templates canvas.

symbols.does: Runs a template brief by opening the build surface with temporary initial brief state.
symbols.description: runTemplateBrief stores the brief in pendingBrief, switches the active surface to build, and clears pendingBrief after 100 milliseconds. The Build canvas receives pendingBrief as initialBrief.

symbols.does: Saves a materialized workshop document and opens the workshop surface with it pending.
symbols.description: runWorkshopTemplate persists the provided materialized document, stores its id as pendingWorkshopDoc, switches active to workshop, and clears the pending id after 200 milliseconds. This lets the Workshop canvas receive a short-lived pending document id.

symbols.does: Copies text to the clipboard and shows a toast.
symbols.description: copyText calls navigator.clipboard.writeText when available, then uses window.dsaToast to report the copied string. It is provided to the CommandPalette.
